search:java-spring-boot-actuator-metrics.content: - **CLI Commands**:¥n  - `mvn spring-boot:run` to run Spring Boot application.¥n  - `curl http://localhost:8080/actuator/metrics` to fetch metrics.¥n¥n- **Latest Versions**:¥n  - Spring Boot Actuator: 3.1.4¥n  - Micrometer: 1.10.5¥n¥n- **Key Config Options**:¥n  - `management.endpoints.web.exposure.include=*` to expose all endpoints.¥n  - `management.metrics.export.prometheus.enabled=true` to enable Prometheus metrics export.¥n  - `management.endpoint.health.show-details=always` to show health details always.

- **CLI Commands**:¥n  - `mvn spring-boot:run` to run Spring Boot application.¥n  - `curl http://localhost:8080/actuator/metrics` to fetch metrics.¥n¥n- **Latest Versions**:¥n  - Spring Boot Actuator: 3.1.4¥n  - Prometheus: 2.37.0¥n¥n- **Key Config Options**:¥n  - `management.endpoints.web.exposure.include=*`: Expose all endpoints.¥n  - `management.metrics.export.prometheus.enabled=true`: Enable Prometheus metrics export.¥n  - `spring.datasource.url=jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/mydb`: Configure datasource URL.

- **Prometheus Integration**:¥n  - Use `@EnablePrometheusEndpoint` to enable Prometheus metrics.¥n  - Add `prometheus-client` dependency in your `pom.xml`.¥n¥n- **Spring Boot Actuator**:¥n  - Enable actuator endpoints with `management.endpoints.web.exposure.include=*`.¥n  - Configure endpoint security using `management.endpoints.web.exposure.exclude=health`.¥n¥n- **Micronaut vs Quarkus vs Spring Boot**:¥n  - Micronaut: Use `./gradlew run` for running the application.¥n  - Quarkus: Use `./mvnw compile quarkus:dev` for development mode.¥n  - Spring Boot: Use `./mvnw spring-boot:run` for running.¥n¥n- **Performance Metrics**:¥n  - Time-to-first-response: Monitor using Prometheus and Grafana dashboards.¥n  - Request-per-second: Use metrics from Actuator or Micrometer.¥n  - Memory efficiency: Analyze heap dump with tools like VisualVM or JProfiler.¥n¥n- **Spring Boot 3.0**:¥n  - Latest version as of my last update is 3.0.x.¥n  - Key config options include `spring.main.lazy-initialization=true` for lazy bean initialization.¥n¥n- **Micronaut 4.0**:¥n  - Latest version as of my last update is 4.0.x.¥n  - Key config options include `micronaut.server.port=8080`.¥n¥n- **Quarkus 3.0**:¥n  - Latest version as of my last update is 3.0.x.¥n  - Key config options include `quarkus.http.host=0.0.0.0`.

- **Prometheus Monitoring**:¥n  - Install Prometheus using Docker: `docker run --name prometheus -p 9090:9090 -v /path/to/prometheus.yml:/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml prom/prometheus`¥n  - Configure Prometheus to scrape metrics from your Spring Boot app.¥n¥n- **Spring Boot Performance Testing**:¥n  - Use JMeter for load testing.¥n  - Example command: `jmeter -n -t testplan.jmx -l results.jtl`¥n¥n- **ycrash Performance Analysis**:¥n  - Install yCrash using Docker: `docker run --name ycrash -p 8080:8080 ycrash/ycrash`¥n  - Configure your Spring Boot app to send metrics to yCrash.¥n¥n- **Key Config Options**:¥n  - Enable Actuator endpoints for monitoring: `management.endpoints.web.exposure.include=*`¥n  - Adjust JVM options for better performance: `-Xmx1024m -Xms512m`¥n¥n- **Latest Versions**:¥n  - Spring Boot: 3.0.x¥n  - Prometheus: 2.37.x¥n  - JMeter: 5.4.1¥n  - yCrash: Latest stable version available on Docker Hub
